# GitHub Repository Settings

Apply these settings at: https://github.com/codeweiz/remote-desktop-control/settings

## Description (About)

```
Remote Terminal Bridge — Access terminal sessions from anywhere via web, mobile, or Feishu bot. Single binary, zero dependencies.
```

## Website

```
https://github.com/codeweiz/remote-desktop-control#quick-start
```

terminal remote-terminal web-terminal xterm websocket cloudflare-tunnel pty node-pty feishu lark mobile expo react-native session-manager cli devtools ssh-alternative

## Social Preview

Consider adding a screenshot or diagram as the social preview image (1280x640px recommended).
